title: Stellarite (Discontinued)
description: This mod adds a new and powerful ore in the nether!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f8eab91a72e45442efce5054b348d1de054f077.png)

###       Explore the depths of the nether in search of a mineral stronger than netherite!
### 

## ⭐ Features

- A new powerful Stellarite armor
- New tools
- Blocks
- New items




![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7d8f8ad83113dc66d1852df94be6b468a16dbfa.png)


## ✨ Planned Features
- Decoration blocks
- Armor and tools effects
- Create & Farmer's Delight support
- Structures
- And much more!
